title: DepSet compiler instability?
body:
@gezalore the XML changes pushed in #3080 turned up a failure with some compilers in this action run https://github.com/verilator/verilator/actions/runs/1063592808

```
%Warning: vlt/t_xml_debugcheck: Line 1504 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_xml_debugcheck/Vt_xml_debugcheck.xml != t/t_xml_debugcheck.out
F1:     <cfile fl="a0" loc="a,0,0,0,0" name="obj_vlt/t_xml_debugcheck/Vt_xml_debugcheck_$root__DepSet_3fb51811__0__Slow.cpp"/>
F2:     <cfile fl="a0" loc="a,0,0,0,0" name="obj_vlt/t_xml_debugcheck/Vt_xml_debugcheck_$root__DepSet_e7f5d2c7__0__Slow.cpp"/>
```

I think this is because the hashing gives a different result in that compiler.

Perhaps you want to take a look?  Not required as I'll push a change to ignore this hash - but would have thought it should be stable.

%Warning: vlt/t_xml_debugcheck: Line 1504 miscompares; obj_vlt/t_xml_debugcheck/Vt_xml_debugcheck.xml != t/t_xml_debugcheck.out
F1:     <cfile fl="a0" loc="a,0,0,0,0" name="obj_vlt/t_xml_debugcheck/Vt_xml_debugcheck_$root__DepSet_3fb51811__0__Slow.cpp"/>
F2:     <cfile fl="a0" loc="a,0,0,0,0" name="obj_vlt/t_xml_debugcheck/Vt_xml_debugcheck_$root__DepSet_e7f5d2c7__0__Slow.cpp"/>
